# NLP Lecture 2026

![](images/NLP2026.png){fig-align="center" width="60%"}

Natural Language Processing

This document covers the fundamentals of NLP, from word embeddings to Transformer architectures, with practical exercises covering implementation and applications.

## Contents

1. **Word Embeddings** - Word vectors, co-occurrence matrices, TF-IDF, PMI, LSA, LDA, and Word2Vec
2. **Transformers** - Attention architecture, contextual embeddings, and language models
3. **Exercises** - Practical implementation 

## Learning objectives

- Master different approaches to word embeddings
- Understand attention mechanisms and Transformers
- Implement the concepts with practical code

---

*Course 2026*
